summary: See clues file for full details. 2 tossups, 7 bonuses found.

works.name: General / Key Works
works.description: Analysis from 2 tossups and 7 bonuses. See clues file for detailed breakdown.

clues.clue: Masaccio frescoes inspired a series by this artist depicting an eagle atop a double cross crucifixion that the Getty restored in 2012.
examples: Masaccio frescoes inspired a series by this artist depicting an eagle atop a double cross crucifixion that the Getty restored in 2012.

clues.clue: This artist used pyroxylin automobile paint for a painting that shows a temple reading "Liberte, Egalite, Fraternite" on fire next to a machine overflowing with gold coins.
examples: This artist used pyroxylin automobile paint for a painting that shows a temple reading "Liberte, Egalite, Fraternite" on fire next to a machine overflowing with gold coins.

clues.clue: "Controlled accidents" were used to create paintings like Landscape with Steer and Collective Suicide at this artist's namesake Experimental Workshop, which informed Jackson Pollock's drip technique.
examples: "Controlled accidents" were used to create paintings like Landscape with Steer and Collective Suicide at this artist's namesake Experimental Workshop, which informed Jackson Pollock's drip technique.

clues.clue: A red-robed crying baby comes out of the mouth of an identical, larger baby in this artist's Echo of a Scream.
examples: A red-robed crying baby comes out of the mouth of an identical, larger baby in this artist's Echo of a Scream.

clues.clue: This artist painted the forces of Science and Technology and the creation of a new race, which are viewed from a rotating platform inside his dodecagonal Polyforum.
examples: This artist painted the forces of Science and Technology and the creation of a new race, which are viewed from a rotating platform inside his dodecagonal Polyforum.

clues.clue: While in Los Angeles, this artist was commissioned to paint a work for the Plaza Art Center which shows a crucifixion scene where a gold-brown eagle is perched on top of the cross.
examples: While in Los Angeles, this artist was commissioned to paint a work for the Plaza Art Center which shows a crucifixion scene where a gold-brown eagle is perched on top of the cross.

clues.clue: That work, set in the jungle around a Mayan ruin, is Tropical America.
examples: That work, set in the jungle around a Mayan ruin, is Tropical America.

clues.clue: In a self-portrait, this man wears a red toga and throws his fist forward, showing bits of smeared paint on his fingers.
examples: In a self-portrait, this man wears a red toga and throws his fist forward, showing bits of smeared paint on his fingers.

clues.clue: Tiny worshippers lift up their arms as a monster crashes through the roof in this man's The Devil in the Church.
examples: Tiny worshippers lift up their arms as a monster crashes through the roof in this man's The Devil in the Church.

clues.clue: A metal falcon, generals and businessmen in gas masks, and a pile of gold appear around a machine feeding blood to an octopus in this artist's Portrait of the Bourgeoisie.
examples: A metal falcon, generals and businessmen in gas masks, and a pile of gold appear around a machine feeding blood to an octopus in this artist's Portrait of the Bourgeoisie.

clues.clue: In another work by this artist, a giant head (*) produces a baby from its mouth above a field of metal scraps.
examples: In another work by this artist, a giant head (*) produces a baby from its mouth above a field of metal scraps.

clues.clue: This painter's Stalinist politics led him on an unsuccessful mission to assassinate Trotsky in 1940.
examples: This painter's Stalinist politics led him on an unsuccessful mission to assassinate Trotsky in 1940.
